content: Fix 1: Reescribir SPORT_RULES['baseball'] y MLB_INTELLIGENCE_RULES con nueva filosofía Moneyball (statcast/pressure/sabermetrics/ghost-edges/market_selection)
Fix 1: Actualizar _build_prefilter_prompt para que MLB no descarte por motivación/cuotas, use tags STRUCTURAL_LEAN/REQUIRES_MANUAL_ODDS/WATCHLIST/DISCARD_AFTER_FULL_ANALYSIS
Fix 3: Crear services/mlb_intelligence_warehouse.py con read/write helpers + pattern_memory con sample_size gates (>=20 modest, >=50 ROI+)
Fix 3: Cablear warehouse en mlb_day_orchestrator.py: load profiles antes de recalc, persist snapshots, integrar pattern_match en pick payload
Tests pytest: test_analyst_engine_mlb_prompt.py + test_mlb_intelligence_warehouse.py (pattern memory + sample_size gates)
Fix 2: Regenerar picks MLB de hoy vía endpoint o script directo y validar campos nuevos en DB
